questions.prompt: Which change should you NOT phase through one device first?
choices: Adding a new vertical-overlay block for Streaming Media
Pushing an emergency Block-list entry in response to a phishing campaign in flight
Tightening the Newly Registered Domain block
Changing block-page logo and notice email
questions.explanation: Emergency threat blocks during an active campaign are the one case where the cost equation is reversed, a missed legitimate site is a ticket; a clicked phishing link is an incident. Push immediately.

questions.prompt: DNSFilter's 'Policy Audit Log' is a category-level enforcement mode that logs traffic without blocking it.
questions.explanation: The Policy Audit Log is a record of changes to policies, who changed what, when. It is not a log-only enforcement mode. There is no documented DNSFilter feature that applies a category in audit-only mode.
